topic.title: Beautiful.ai Education Plan.
topic.text:
Beautiful.ai Education Plan.

Beautiful.ai is a "Smart Slide" presentation tool that automates design logic. It prevents "pixel-pushing" and ensures students focus on their actual research and narrative rather than wrestling with alignment, font sizes, or rogue formatting.

The Educational Benefit

Verified students and educators are eligible for a Free Annual Pro Subscription (a value of approximately $144/year). This plan unlocks unlimited slides, custom branding, and advanced AI content generation.

  • The Link: https://www.beautiful.ai/education

⚠️ Essential Signup Instructions

To ensure the automated verification system works, all students and faculty must follow this specific email convention:

  • USE: [username]@northeastern.edu — This is the only domain recognized for the immediate Education Plan discount.

  • AVOID: [username]@neu.edu — While this is a valid alias for receiving mail, Beautiful.ai's system does not recognize it for educational verification.

Student Tip: If you already created an account using @neu.edu, go to Account Settings and update your email to the @northeastern.edu version before attempting to claim the offer.

Quick Start: Setting Up Your Theme

Once you have your Pro account, you can apply your brand "DNA" to every slide instantly.

1. Accessing the Theme Editor

In the top-left corner of any presentation, click the Theme tab. Select Edit Theme to open the customization panel.

2. Applying Your Colors

In the Colors tab, you can enter your specific Hex codes (like the Bear Brown Chocolate #3D160A).

  • Primary Palette: Set your main background and accent colors.

  • Special Colors: Assign specific colors for "Positive" (e.g., Deep Teal) and "Negative/Alert" (e.g., Crimson) data. These will automatically populate your charts and icons.

3. Locking in Your Typography

Choose your primary and secondary fonts. For a consistent academic or professional look, stick to two complementary fonts (e.g., a serif for headlines and a sans-serif for body text).

4. Adding Your Signature/Logo

Go to the Decoration or Footer tab.

  • Upload: Use an optimized PNG or SVG of your signature or logo.

  • Placement: Set it to the bottom-left or bottom-right. Once saved, it will appear on every slide in the presentation automatically, ensuring your "brand" is permanent and non-editable.

The "Smart" Advantage

Once your theme is saved, you don't "design" slides—you direct them. If you add a list, a chart, or a photo, the tool will automatically apply your colors and fonts. If you change your theme later, every single slide in the deck will update simultaneously.

How to Customize and Apply Themes in Beautiful.ai

This tutorial provides a visual walkthrough of the theme settings, helping you lock in your visual identity so you can get back to the work that matters.
